name: -a
--all
options.description: Include directory entries whose names begin with a dot

options.name: -la
options.description: Long listing format including hidden files

options.name: -lh
options.description: Long listing format with human-readable sizes

name: -h
--human-readable
options.description: Print sizes in human readable format (e.g., 1K, 234M)

name: -t
options.description: Sort by modification time, newest first

name: -S
options.description: Sort by file size, largest first

name: -d
--directory
options.description: List directories themselves, not their contents

name: -i
--inode
options.description: Print the index number of each file

name: -s
--size
options.description: Print the allocated size of each file in blocks
